concepts.name: v2 card signature is domain-separated, non-kind-0 (RD-4)
UTF-8 name 32-byte cap + truncation (utf8ByteLength/truncateUtf8 exported by codec)
concepts.cross_story_watch: S3 MUST reuse contactCard.ts exports utf8ByteLength/truncateUtf8 for its identity-only card name cap — do NOT re-implement (would create duplicated_invariant/multi_owner).

concepts.name: Share-card cache key invalidates on active-nonce rotation
PAIRING_ACK_KIND must not collide with sentinels 444/21059/5/7/14
Onboarding-deferred echo fires iff still within the intent's window
Expired or pairing-less input degrades to one-directional add, no error
Every new user-facing string has both en and de i18n.ts entries
New idb-keyval stores use the few-* naming convention (not frozen lp_*)
PairingAckSend seam: scanner-triggered echo call contract

stories.notes: v2 wire format spliced into the pure codec in place (not forked). Strict parser is the single shared version/HAS_AVATAR/reserved gate. Opus review: 3 findings all < sev 5; test-coverage finding (2038 high-bit + v2 created_at tamper) closed by lead.

public_contracts_added: isNonceAdmissible(nonceHex, nowSec) — NonceAdmissibility seam (S3 consumes verbatim)
buildOwnShareCardV2; getOwnShareCard now produces v2 (production path switched v1->v2)
stories.notes: Seam grace math exact (nowSec<=expiresAt+7200) and read-only. idb createStore verified lazy (build-safe). Opus: 2 findings <sev5 — dead-code buildOwnShareCard v1 (doc-comment corrected, function retained as preexisting API), forward prune note carried to S3.

SECURITY CORE. Opus: sender-binding+walled-garden+kind-isolation+privacy all verified sound, no circumvention. 2 non-security findings fixed (empty-name guard; malformed test assertion). Codex caught a real cross-cutting regression Opus missed: v1->v2 share switch broke NIP-46 bunker signing (perm list lacked sign_event:20602) — FIXED. NIP-46 perm list has no unit coverage (heavy React module, no-jsdom convention) — documented gap.

Persist-before-redirect/attempt hold; retry re-queues. Review round-1: fixed already_exists echo-skip (sev5, returning scanner now reciprocates; spec amendment added) + concurrent double-drain (sev3, per-issuer in-flight lock). Examiner 0 NO, 3 PARTIAL (doc/scope notes, non-blocking).

UI/i18n + sanctioned S4 already_exists remediation. Review round-1: 3 findings fixed — already_exists regression test; digest peek-not-mint (structural: peek param type has no mint capability); error-constant extraction. Examiner 10/10 YES. MV-1 (QR phone-scan) is manual — QR-density computed (v2=version8/49x49 @ECC-L, scannable).

6 relay-bucket e2e specs, ran GREEN against live Docker relay (individually + together). Publish-through-app rule held; one documented forgery exception (forgedPairingAck.ts) with self-check + positive control. AC-ADMIT-6 proven end-to-end. Fixed 2 real bugs (Next static-export trailing-slash URL regex x3, .or() strict-mode). Tally 50->56 / relay 38->44. Examiner 11/11 YES.

reviewer_state.note: S6 is e2e-only (no production module); pre-commit gate covers whole tree.

watches: [RESOLVED] pairing-mutual-completion-on-already-exists: fixed + now regression-tested at processContactInput level (S5 finding F1).
[DISCHARGED S5] i18n-en-de-coverage: all epic keys en+de, parity test present.
[DISCHARGED S5] digest-active-nonce-peek: digest now uses peekActiveNonce (no mint on ack receipt).
[CLOSED] card-name-byte-cap: no remaining story touches name bytes.
nip46-perms-untested: sign_event:20602 added; REQUIRED_PERMS still has no unit coverage (React module) — consider e2e/bunker coverage. Carry to S6/gates.
MV-1 QR-scannability: manual phone-camera check owed at epic-done gate; computed evidence v2=version8/49x49 ECC-L.
